title: Update Meet the Team heading, News section CTA text, and remove gun animation

requirements.text: In the 'Meet the Team' (Roster) section, change the section heading text to 'Meet With LEGEND'.

quotes: Jo meet the team he wahan lilkho :Meet With LEGEND

acceptanceCriteria: The Roster/Meet the Team section heading displays 'Meet With LEGEND' instead of the previous heading text.
The heading styling remains consistent with the esports visual theme.

requirements.text: In the News section, change the call-to-action button or label text to read 'Join Now' on the first line and 'For Tournament' on the second line (or as two distinct styled lines). This targets the two anchor/button elements at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/a[1] and /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/a[2].

quotes: news wale par likho Join Now For Tournament

acceptanceCriteria: The News section displays a CTA element with 'Join Now' and 'For Tournament' as the text content.
The two link elements at the specified XPaths are updated to show 'Join Now' and 'For Tournament' respectively.
The styling remains consistent with the esports visual theme.

requirements.text: Remove the gun/shooting canvas animation from the hero section. The canvas element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/canvas[1] renders a shooting animation (drawn arm, gun, bullets, shell casings, muzzle flash, recoil effects) — remove this entire animation and its associated canvas element, animation logic, and related code from HeroSection.tsx.

quotes: gun wala koi Bhi animation he us ko remove kro

acceptanceCriteria: The canvas element for the gun/shooting animation is no longer present in the hero section.
No gun, arm, bullet, shell casing, muzzle flash, or recoil animation renders anywhere on the page.
The hero section layout remains intact and visually coherent after the canvas is removed.
All animation-related JavaScript/canvas code in HeroSection.tsx is cleaned up.

constraints: Do not modify files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Only update the specified elements — do not alter other hero section content or unrelated components.
nonGoals: Changing any backend logic or data models.
Modifying the Navbar or Footer components.
Altering the 'Legend X Arena' brand name styling or centering already implemented.
